case_title: FOELL KURT W VS DIFIORE JERRY J.D.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,700.00 FILED BY FOELL KURT W AS TO DEFENDANT DIFIORE JERRY J.D. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-04-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04
